title: PostgreSQL Database
description: This dashboard works with postgres_exporter for prometheus

targets.expr: sum(pg_stat_database_blks_hit{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment"}) / (sum(pg_stat_database_blks_hit{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment"}) + sum(pg_stat_database_blks_read{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment"}) + 1) * 100

sum by (instance) (pg_stat_activity_count{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment",state="active"}) / sum by (instance) (pg_settings_max_connections{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment"}) * 100

sum(rate(pg_stat_database_xact_commit{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment"}[5m])) / (sum(rate(pg_stat_database_xact_commit{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment"}[5m])) + sum(rate(pg_stat_database_xact_rollback{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment"}[5m])) + 0.001) * 100

panels.description: Virtual and Resident memory size in bytes, averages over 5 min interval
panels.title: Average Memory Usage

panels.description: Average user and system CPU time spent in seconds.
panels.title: Average CPU Usage

targets.expr: pg_stat_activity_count{datname=~"$datname", instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", state=~"idle|idle in transaction|idle in transaction (aborted)"}

pg_stat_database_blks_hit{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", datname=~"$datname"} / (pg_stat_database_blks_read{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", datname=~"$datname"} + pg_stat_database_blks_hit{instance=~"$instance", cluster=~"$cluster", environment=~"$environment", datname=~"$datname"})

panels.description: Total amount of data written to temporary files by queries in this database. All temporary files are counted, regardless of why the temporary file was created, and regardless of the log_temp_files setting.
panels.title: Temp File (Bytes)

targets.legendFormat: write_time - Total amount of time that has been spent in the portion of checkpoint processing where files are written to disk.
sync_time - Total amount of time that has been spent in the portion of checkpoint processing where files are synchronized to disk.
